hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into a unified workflow that routes onboarding reviews by risk level while preserving audit evidence and enforcing internal policies.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Onboarding slows with disconnected risk routing
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and manual checks when onboarding decisions are routed without unified provider information or risk context. This fragmentation weakens audit trails and complicates consistent, policy-driven risk reviews across customer and counterparty profiles.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC and KYB provider results, risk scoring, sanctions and screening data into a unified risk-based routing workflow that supports consistent review and preserves audit evidence for onboarding decisions.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to risk-based approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs through policy-based routing, review workflows, decisions and evidence to support auditable onboarding approvals.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider results into risk-based routing, structured review workflows, decision records and audit-ready onboarding evidence without replacing existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled onboarding workflows that preserve audit evidence, streamline provider orchestration and enable secure, enterprise-grade compliance deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support risk-based onboarding routing workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how onboarding decisions route by risk level
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how onboarding evidence supports audit-ready reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how provider outputs connect to risk-based routing
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for onboarding compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects KYC, KYB, sanctions, UBO and identity checks into one structured onboarding workflow tailored for digital asset compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support risk-based routing?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal policies and risk thresholds to route onboarding cases dynamically based on jurisdiction, client type and risk factors from provider outputs.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, provider results and supporting evidence within cases to enable audit-ready review and traceability of onboarding actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC and KYB providers, orchestrating their outputs into a connected compliance workflow without disrupting current vendor setups.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured reviews, compliance decisions, and auditable onboarding evidence.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC, KYB and risk outputs into controlled workflows, routing and audit-ready onboarding evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
